# Day 2 - Antigravity CLI Hands-On

## Overview

This day's work focused on exploring Antigravity CLI and understanding AI-assisted software development workflows.

## Activities Completed

* Installed and configured Antigravity CLI
* Authenticated using Google OAuth
* Explored CLI commands and configuration
* Tested model switching
* Used shell mode
* Generated files using AI prompts
* Built a complete Flask web application

## Project

### BigQuery Release Notes Dashboard

Location:

```text
Code/bq-release-notes
```

Features:

* Fetches BigQuery Release Notes from Google's XML feed
* Flask backend
* Vanilla HTML/CSS/JavaScript frontend
* Search and filtering
* Refresh support
* Twitter sharing integration
* Responsive dashboard UI

## Documentation

See:

* `Code/bq-release-notes/README.md`
* `Code/bq-release-notes/PROJECT_REPORT.md`

for detailed project documentation.
